description_long: This lamp features a dramatic and fantastical design, with a large dragon perched atop a rectangular pedestal. The dragon's wings are fully extended, curving outward and downward, creating a striking silhouette. Its head is lowered, mouth open, and claws gripping the pedestal, giving the impression of a guardian or sentinel. The lamp's body is highly detailed, with visible scales, horns, and a long, curled tail. The pedestal is simple and geometric, contrasting with the ornate and organic form of the dragon. The light source is likely integrated into the pedestal or subtly incorporated into the dragon's body, illuminating the sculpture from below.
description: A highly detailed dragon sculpture lamp perched on a rectangular pedestal, with outstretched wings and intricate features. The design is both decorative and imposing, suitable as a statement piece in an urban setting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dragon's face, outstretched wings, and claws gripping the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dragon's wing curvature, tail, and profile of the head and horns.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full span of the dragon's wings and the back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the opposite wing, tail, and side profile of the dragon.
